homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece serves as a perfect example of traditional Middle Eastern music, featuring the mesmerizing sounds of the oud and lute. It is accompanied by the rhythmic beats of the tabla and the melancholic notes of the darbuka, where the absence of vocals allows listeners to immerse themselves in this ancient art form.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This recording captures the soothing sounds of ocean waves and nature from a small fishing port, creating a peaceful atmosphere ideal for mindfulness. The gentle rustling and binaural wave textures are presented as a field soundscape that invites listeners to appreciate the calming presence of the sea with headphones.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This lively and cheerful track features a female vocalist singing in a high-pitched, melodic voice. Her performance is supported by a fast acoustic guitar, a groovy bass line, and a prominent accordion that drives the upbeat rhythm. The song's energetic feel and festive mood make it sound like music often heard during celebratory scenes in Latin American shows.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a solo acoustic guitar performance by Christian Zell, characterized by a slow and steady rhythmic beat. The simple yet effective melody creates a melancholic and reflective atmosphere, making the piece ideal for contemplative moments or quiet film scenes. Overall, the music conveys a somber and introspective mood through its minimalist approach.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This amateur recording captures a male singer performing a traditional folk song accompanied by a choir and a simple, steady beat. The atmosphere is melancholic yet grounded in the rhythmic traditions of Jongo, as noted in the upload's context about a live performance at Casa Luz de Yorimá.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a hip-hop instrumental featuring a male vocalist who raps over a strong bass line and steady drumming. The keyboard accompaniment adds to the urban and groovy mood, giving it a vibe suitable for a city crime film soundtrack.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
